visual_description: A woman with voluminous blonde hair, wearing a white collared shirt and a dark cardigan, sits at a table in a busy restaurant. She looks down at her food, then looks up and speaks to a man sitting across from her. She picks up a small piece of food with her fingers and brings it to her mouth.
audio_description: The audio consists of a single, sustained, low-pitched electronic tone, similar to a dial tone or a test signal.
